message:
chore: ignore accidental stray numeric files in .gitignore

Add patterns for single and double-digit files at the repo root (e.g.
"2", "42") which are created accidentally by shell redirects or stray
agent output and should never be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -60,3 +60,7 @@ artifacts/perf/round*_*.svg
 ci-artifacts/
 proptest-regressions/
 test_meminfo
+
+# Accidental shell output (stray numeric/short-name files)
+/[0-9]
+/[0-9][0-9]
